designBrief.playerFantasy: A nimble explorer collects a key and reaches an exit while avoiding a timed hazard.

coreLoop.summary: Explore, collect the key, avoid the hazard pulse, unlock the exit, and leave.

mechanics.summary: Player moves horizontally and jumps over one hazard.
A local key collectible enables the exit.

win: Player reaches the exit after collecting the key.
loss: Player touches the hazard pulse before reaching the exit.

scenesLevels.summary: Single-screen level with start, key, hazard, and exit.

nonGoals.text: No shipped game, commercial readiness, or native export claim.

acceptanceGoals.text: A trusted scenario can verify collect-key then exit.

designBrief.boundary: Input validation contract only, not generation authority. GDD-derived output is untrusted until Rust/local validation and review-gated apply; no autonomous unrestricted game creation.

boundary: Reuses Milestone 30 and GDD/design-brief surfaces; decomposes intent into a plan; proposal-only; review/apply/trust-gradient path; browser/Studio read-only; no direct trusted writes; no auto-apply; no auto-merge; no production-ready claim; no engine replacement claim.
